channel.title: Finance
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Finance, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: How Modi’s AI handholding moment backfired as Sam and Dario refused to play along
item.description: “I didn't know what was happening,” Altman later said, adding he was “confused, like when (Modi) grabbed my hand and put it up."

item.title: Quordle Hints And Answers For Saturday, February 21
item.description: Looking for some help with today’s Quordle words? Some hints and the answers are right here to give you a hand.

item.title: First, Colbert, now ‘The View’: Trump’s FCC opens equal time investigation into political chat show
item.description: “The FCC has an enforcement action underway on that,” Chairman Brendan Carr told reporters after an agency meeting Wednesday.

item.title: PayPal Confirms Data Breach — Money Stolen, Passwords Reset
item.description: PayPal has confirmed a breach that exposed personal information to a hacker. Are you affected? What data was exposed?

item.title: GDP growth sharply slows to 1.4%, less than half of fourth quarter expectations
item.description: Economists say the small bump in unemployment rates is due to the Trump Administration's immigration crackdown stalling population growth.

item.title: Something big is happening in AI, but that’s the only thing Matt Shumer got right
item.description: This could be the greatest democratizing event of all time.

item.title: Fed's favored inflation gauge showed consumer price growth remained elevated in December
item.description: The Commerce Department released the PCE inflation report on Friday, which showed the Fed's favored inflation gauge remained elevated as consumers dea...

item.title: Deadliest jobs in America revealed
item.description: The United States Bureau of Labor Statistics reported that there were more than 5,000 deadly work injuries recorded in the nation in 2024.

item.title: A New Update About ‘The Night Agent’ Season 4 Renewal, Release Date
item.description: The Night Agent season 4 is almost certainly coming, and we already know about its potential release date based on new information.

item.title: US economy grew slower than expected in fourth quarter
item.description: The U.S. economy grew at a rate of 1.4% in the fourth quarter of 2025, according to an estimate released on Friday by the Bureau of Economic Analysis.

item.title: Making LLMs Smart With Transformers: It’s A Really Big Deal
item.description: The transformer did a lot for the LLM, but even better architectures are coming.

item.title: This math graduate applied to over 1,000 jobs and still didn’t hear back—so he moved to Austria
item.description: Gen Z and millennial workers in Britain are so fed up with being ghosted by employers that some are giving up on the country altogether.

item.title: India Ramps Up AI Infrastructure Investment With $200 Billion Target
item.description: At the India AI Impact Summit, industry leaders made commitments collectively aiming to invest over $200 billion in AI infrastructure over the coming ...

item.title: US businesses shift away from China under Trump tariffs
item.description: China's trade with U.S. midsize businesses plummeted 20% as Trump tariffs hit 37.4%, forcing companies to shift suppliers to Southeast Asia and beyond...

item.title: Fed-favored gauge shows central bank has more inflation-fighting work to do
Economic calendar: Friday brings PCE inflation data and fourth-quarter GDP
GDP report shows U.S. economic growth slowing to just 1.4% in fourth quarter
Supreme Court rejects Trump’s tariffs. But he’s not out of options.
Blue-chip stocks slip as investors key on prospective ruling on Trump’s tariffs
Trump admin ramps up effort to revive coal industry as power demand surges
item.description: The Trump administration is looking to extend the useful life of coal-fired power plants to boost the nation's energy security amid rising demand from...

item.title: Reid Hoffman Raises $24.6 Million for AI Cancer-Research Startup
item.description: The LinkedIn co-founder is starting Manas AI with “The Emperor of All Maladies” author Siddhartha Mukherjee.

item.title: Silicon Valley Is Raving About a Made-in-China AI Model
item.description: DeepSeek is called “amazing and impressive” despite working with less-advanced chips.

item.title: What to Know About China's DeepSeek AI
item.description: The Chinese upstart says it has trained high-performing AI models cheaply, without using the most advanced chips.

item.title: Tech, Media & Telecom Roundup: Market Talk
item.description: DeepSeek, SoFi and more in the latest Market Talks covering Technology, Media and Telecom.

item.title: Can an App Replace a Personal Trainer? I Tested Nearly a Dozen to Find Out
item.description: Apps can add flexibility and freshness to your routine. Just try not to get injured.
